bullets: Building app-maker.ai — a multi-tenant LLM-powered agentic workflow platform targeting low-to-no-code users, enabling non-technical users to build and deploy complex AI workflows without writing code
Delivers sub-5-second end-to-end workflow completion at high availability across a large consumer base, with intelligent routing across all major LLM providers
Engineered a high-performance Rust backend optimized for concurrency, memory safety, and low-latency task dispatch
Built a Next.js frontend for workflow authoring, execution, and monitoring; implemented full CI test infrastructure with automated deployment pipelines
Architected and maintained the evaluation and analytics pipeline for Microsoft Copilot, owning infrastructure design, metrics, and reporting
Reduced pipeline runtime from multiple days to a few hours through infrastructure optimization and parallelization
Delivered data tooling and reporting solutions for data science teams to track and validate Copilot quality at scale
Designed metric calibration infrastructure to validate evaluation fidelity
Designed and delivered the full developer toolchain for a conversational AI SDK: VSCode extension with LSP support, CLI, and documentation
Drove enterprise customer adoption by resolving integration blockers and shaping the API surface from real-world usage feedback
Built CI pipelines, training pipeline optimization, and alerting infrastructure
Built a mobile app leveraging Microsoft Cognitive Services and neural image transformation to empower students to create AI-generated art
Architected a ReactJS-powered community display exhibited in a major cultural institution

Architected and delivered the audio source/sink manager powering the Formation Series — commercially shipped networked wireless speakers — under a strict sub-10-microsecond inter-device synchronization latency budget
Developed third-party audio plugins enabling Spotify, Roon, and AirPlay support across the Formation Series ecosystem
Built the application layer and SDK for a Broadcom VideoHub set-top box; delivered an IP camera discovery and media streaming engine; developed a hierarchical multi-process persistent data store
Developed and taught a 10-week computer science course for students aged 5–81 in the East Palo Alto community
StreetCode provides free technology education to underserved communities — learn more
